rollbackOwner: A3 release operations with PM review
rollbackCommand: Manual platform rollback step only: restore NEXT_PUBLIC_DATA_SOURCE to mock, redeploy, then rerun public route smoke and runtime boundary checks.
publicCopyFallbackLine: 資料暫時無法更新時，本頁會保留最後可確認狀態並明確標示更新時間；請勿把單一燈號視為投資建議。
freshnessFallbackLine: 若資料延遲或暫停更新，燈號僅供市場狀態觀察，請以頁面顯示的更新時間作為判讀前提。
stopLine: Draft validates operator packet shape only. Do not execute, mutate runtime flags, connect to Supabase, run SQL, write data, or promote publicDataSource/scoreSource from this file.
